description_long: This is a double-basin rectangular sink, likely made from a dark, enameled metal or composite material. Each basin is deep and separated by a central divider, with gently rounded corners and slightly sloped sides for efficient drainage. The rim is broad and flat, suitable for drop-in installation on a countertop. There are no visible faucet fixtures or overflow holes, and the drain openings are not clearly shown but are likely located at the center or rear of each basin. The overall finish is smooth and glossy, giving the sink a modern, utilitarian appearance. This type of sink is commonly found in utility rooms, garages, or outdoor urban environments for washing or cleaning purposes.
description: A double-basin, rectangular, dark-colored sink with a smooth, glossy finish and a central divider, suitable for utility or urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing both deep basins and the central divider, with the wide rim visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of one basin and the thickness of the rim.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, showing both basins and the divider from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the depth of a single basin and the rim.
attribute_drain_location: left basin: center, right basin: center
